data.title: Seamless.AI Tutorial: Find B2B Leads in Real Time
data.excerpt: Step-by-step guide to using Seamless.AI for B2B prospecting. Learn how to find verified emails and phone numbers directly from LinkedIn. Start free today!

$media.alt: Seamless.AI Tutorial: Find B2B Leads in Real Time

children.text: If you've ever stared at a LinkedIn profile thinking, "I *know* this person is a perfect fit for my product — but I have zero way to reach them," you already understand why Seamless.AI exists. It solves that exact frustration by pulling verified emails, direct phone numbers, and deeper contact intelligence straight from LinkedIn profiles and company pages — in real time.

I've been using Seamless.AI for several months now, and this tutorial walks you through everything: from creating your first account to running advanced searches that surface decision-makers you'd never find manually. No fluff. Just the steps that actually matter.
Let's get into it.
What Exactly Is Seamless.AI?

Seamless.AI is an AI-powered prospecting engine built for B2B sales teams, solopreneurs, recruiters, and anyone who needs direct access to decision-makers. Unlike static databases that rot every quarter, Seamless.AI runs a real-time search engine. When you look up a contact, it scans and verifies on the spot — so the data you get is current, not six months stale.
The core promise is simple:
type a name or a company, get verified contact info in seconds.

But the platform has evolved significantly. Today it also handles automated outreach sequences, job change tracking, buyer intent signals, and AI-assisted messaging — making it closer to a full revenue operating system than a simple email finder.
If you want to see what all the buzz is about, you can
create a free account right here
and follow along with this guide.
Step 1: Create Your Account and Connect LinkedIn
Getting started takes about two minutes.
1. **Head to
seamless.ai
and click "Sign up free."** The free tier gives you a handful of credits to test the platform — enough to run real searches and see real results before you commit a single dollar.
Install the Seamless.AI Chrome extension.

This is the piece that makes everything click. Once installed, it overlays directly on top of LinkedIn, Sales Navigator, and even company websites. You'll see a small icon on profiles that lets you pull contact data with one click.
Connect your CRM.
Seamless.AI integrates natively with Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, Zoho, and several others. If you use
ClickUp
or
monday.com
for workflow management, you can push leads there too via integrations or Zapier.
Set your preferences.
You can configure default filters for job titles, company size, industries, and locations so that every search starts pre-scoped to your ideal customer profile.
That's it. You're ready to prospect.
Step 2: Run Your First Prospect Search
Here's where Seamless.AI earns its reputation.

Open LinkedIn (or Sales Navigator — Seamless plays nicely with both). Navigate to a search results page or a specific profile. You'll notice the Seamless.AI extension now visible on each result card or profile header.
Option A: One-by-one from LinkedIn profiles.

Click the Seamless icon on any profile. The extension fires a real-time lookup and returns verified email addresses, direct dials, and sometimes additional data like company revenue estimates or tech stack. Click "Save" to push that contact into your Seamless.AI lists — and from there, straight into your CRM.
Option B: Bulk search.
Inside the Seamless.AI web app, you can run bulk searches using filters:
Job title (e.g., VP of Marketing, Head of Engineering)
Company size (1-10, 11-50, 51-200, etc.)
Industry
Location (country, state, city)
Keywords (specific skills, technologies, or responsibilities)

Hit search, and Seamless returns a list of matching contacts — each with an AI confidence score indicating how likely the contact info is to be accurate. You can select the ones you want and bulk-export or push to your CRM in one action.
Pro tip:

Start narrow. Pick one title at one company size in one geography. Get 20-30 contacts. Test outreach. Then scale your filters once you see response rates that work. This approach beats dumping 500 unverified leads into a cold email blast every time.
Step 3: Verify and Enrich Your Data
This is a step many users skip — and it costs them replies.

After pulling contacts, Seamless.AI shows verification status on each email and phone number. Green means verified. Yellow means likely but not confirmed. You can re-run verification on any contact to get a fresh real-time scan.
For users on paid plans, the
Data Enrichment add-on
takes this further. It fills in missing fields like:
Secondary emails (personal addresses, aliases)
Social profiles
Company firmographic data (funding rounds, employee count trends, revenue bracket)
Technographic data (what tools the company uses)
This enrichment turns a basic contact card into a mini dossier. When you know a prospect's company just raised a Series B and uses Salesforce, your outreach pitch practically writes itself.
Step 4: Automate Outreach with Connect and AI Agents
Finding contacts is half the battle. Reaching out at scale — without sounding robotic — is the other half.
Seamless.AI's built-in Connect feature lets you build multi-step outreach sequences directly from the platform. You can combine:
Automated emails
with personalization tokens (first name, company, job title, pain point)
Phone call tasks
that pop up on your dashboard at the right cadence
Task reminders
for manual touches like LinkedIn messages or handwritten notes

The AI Assistant (available on higher-tier plans) drafts email copy based on the prospect's profile and your value proposition. It's not perfect out of the box — you'll want to tweak the tone — but it cuts initial drafting time by 70-80% in my experience.

For teams that want maximum automation, the Autopilot add-on runs sequences end-to-end: find leads, verify contacts, send emails, track opens and replies, and re-engage non-responders — all without manual intervention.
If you've used
Apollo.io

before, Seamless.AI's approach feels similar in structure but notably stronger on real-time data accuracy. Where Apollo pulls from a shared database (sometimes outdated), Seamless verifies at the moment of your search. That difference compounds fast when you're sending hundreds of emails a week.
Step 5: Track Job Changes and Buyer Intent
Here's where the platform shifts from "useful" to "genuinely powerful."
Job Changes Filter

monitors your saved contacts and alerts you when someone switches roles. Why does this matter? A VP of Marketing who just joined a new company is one of the warmest prospects alive. They're actively evaluating vendors. They have budget authority. And they're not yet locked into incumbent tools. Seamless flags these automatically so you can reach out within days of the move — not months.
Buyer Intent Data

(add-on) goes even deeper. It signals when a company is actively researching solutions in your category. Think of it as a fire alarm for sales: you know *which* accounts are in-market *right now*, so you can prioritize outreach to the people most likely to respond.

Together, these two features create a proactive prospecting engine that surfaces opportunities you'd otherwise miss entirely. No more cold-calling random lists. You're reaching the right person at the right moment with the right message.
New and Highlighted Features Worth Knowing
Seamless.AI ships updates frequently. Here are the features that stand out right now:
Real-Time Search Engine (upgraded):
The backbone of the platform. Every search runs live — not from a pre-stored database. Accuracy has improved noticeably in recent months.
AI Assistant:
Drafts outreach emails, suggests subject lines, and adapts tone based on the prospect's seniority and industry.
Autopilot:
End-to-end automation from lead discovery to follow-up sequences. Ideal for teams that want a hands-off pipeline.
Buyer Intent Data:
Identifies companies actively researching solutions like yours. Huge time-saver for prioritizing accounts.
Job Changes Filter:
Tracks when saved contacts change roles and sends real-time alerts.
Data Enrichment:
Fills in missing firmographic, technographic, and personal details on every contact.
Premium Integrations:
Native connections to Salesforce, HubSpot, Outreach, Salesloft, and more. One-click data sync.
API Access:
For teams that want to pipe Seamless data into custom dashboards, internal tools, or proprietary workflows.
Enterprise Security and Compliance:
SOC 2 compliant, GDPR-aware, with role-based access controls for larger organizations.
Want a deeper dive on what's new? Check out our
full feature breakdown
Who Is Seamless.AI Ideal For?
This tool shines brightest for specific profiles:
B2B SaaS sales reps and SDRs:
If your job is booking meetings with decision-makers, Seamless eliminates the hardest part of your workflow — finding accurate contact info fast.
Founders and solopreneurs doing their own sales:
No budget for a dedicated sales team? Seamless gives you enterprise-grade prospecting power at a startup-friendly price.
Recruiters:
Finding candidates' direct emails and phone numbers speeds up sourcing dramatically, especially for hard-to-fill roles.
Marketing agencies:
Build targeted prospect lists for clients, enrich existing databases, and run account-based campaigns with real-time data.
Sales teams already using Salesforce or HubSpot:
The native integrations make Seamless feel like a natural extension of your existing stack, not another tool to manage.
If you're curious whether it fits your specific workflow, we wrote a detailed piece on
who should choose Seamless.AI and why
Tips to Get the Most Out of Seamless.AI
After months of daily use, here's what I'd tell a new user:
Start with the Chrome extension.
The web app is great, but the real magic happens when you're browsing LinkedIn and pulling contacts in real time. It becomes second nature.
Use confidence scores wisely.
Only push green-verified contacts into your cold outreach sequences. Yellow contacts are fine for enrichment or secondary campaigns.
Layer Job Changes with outreach timing.
When someone lands in a new role, they're 3-5x more responsive to vendor outreach in the first 30 days. Set up alerts and act fast.
Combine Seamless with your CRM's automation.
Pull contacts with Seamless, push to HubSpot or Salesforce, then let your CRM's native sequences handle follow-up. Best of both worlds.
Test the Buyer Intent add-on with a small segment first.
Pick 10-15 target accounts, activate intent signals, and measure reply rates before scaling.
For more practical advice, see our
tips and best practices guide
Ready to Try Seamless.AI?
I recommend Seamless.AI because it does what most prospecting tools promise but few deliver:
real-time, verified contact data that actually connects you to real humans.
The free tier is generous enough to prove value on your own terms, and the paid plans scale cleanly as your pipeline grows.
Get started with Seamless.AI free — no credit card required
. Run ten searches today and see the data quality for yourself. If you've been burning hours on manual prospecting, this is the tool that gives those hours back.
*Disclosure: This post contains affiliate links. If you sign up through our links, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. We only recommend tools we actively use and trust.*

children.text: Is Seamless.AI really free to use?

Yes. Seamless.AI offers a free tier with a limited number of credits that let you test the platform with real searches. No credit card is required to sign up. Paid plans unlock higher credit volumes, bulk search, integrations, and advanced features like Buyer Intent Data and Autopilot.
How accurate is the contact data from Seamless.AI?

Seamless.AI runs a real-time search engine, meaning it verifies emails and phone numbers at the moment of your search — not from a stale database. Verified contacts (green status) consistently show high deliverability rates. You can also re-run verification on any contact to get a fresh accuracy check.
Can Seamless.AI integrate with my existing CRM?

Absolutely. Seamless.AI has native integrations with Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, Zoho CRM, Outreach, Salesloft, and more. You can push verified contacts directly into your CRM with one click. It also offers API access for custom workflows and connects with tools like Zapier for additional flexibility.
